creator: sergey@akhmatov.ru
text:
Created attachment 197512
databases/py-cassandra-driver

The attached patch adds new port.

A modern, feature-rich and highly-tunable Python client library for
Apache Cassandra (2.1+) using exclusively Cassandra's binary protocol
and Cassandra Query Language v3.

QA:
poudriere testport OK: 10.4 and 11.2 with all flavors and options.
